hero.badge: Earn passive income from your parking space
hero.title: Turn Your Space Into Real Income
hero.sub: List your parking space on Space Park and earn money every time someone parks. Real-time analytics, automatic payouts, and total control — all in your partner dashboard.

process.title: Up and Running in 3 Steps
process.sub: Get your parking space listed and start earning — no technical expertise needed

step1.label: Step 1
step1.title: Submit Your Application
step1.desc: Fill in your space details, pin your location on the map, and upload proof of ownership — takes under 5 minutes.

step2.label: Step 2
step2.title: Get Approved in Days
step2.desc: Our team reviews within 2–5 business days. Check your status with your Application ID. You'll get login credentials by email.

step3.label: Step 3
step3.title: Earn Automatically
step3.desc: Your zone goes live immediately. Monitor earnings, sessions, and performance from your dedicated partner dashboard.

card1.title: Keep 90% of Earnings
card1.desc: We charge a transparent 10% commission — no hidden fees, no setup costs, no monthly charges. What you earn is yours.

card2.title: Real-Time Analytics
card2.desc: Monitor occupancy rates, session history, and daily earnings with a beautiful, purpose-built partner dashboard.

card3.title: Automatic Bank Payouts
card3.desc: Link your bank account once and receive automatic deposits — no manual withdrawal process required.

card4.title: Instant App Visibility
card4.desc: Your zone appears on the Space Park mobile app the moment it's approved, visible to thousands of drivers searching for parking daily.

card5.title: Verified & Trusted
card5.desc: Every listed space is verified by our team, giving drivers confidence and driving higher occupancy for your zone.

card6.title: Self-Service Management
card6.desc: Update your hourly rate, operating hours, and zone details from your dashboard anytime, without needing to contact support.

mobile.title: Drivers Find You on Space Park
mobile.sub: Your listed zone is immediately visible to drivers using the Space Park app — search, park, and pay all in one place.

card1.title: Find Parking
card1.desc: Drivers search for available zones near their destination in real time.

card2.title: Cashless Payment
card2.desc: Every session is paid digitally — no cash handling needed on your end.

card3.title: Session Tracking
card3.desc: Start, extend, and end parking sessions from the app with full audit trail.

card4.title: Instant Notifications
card4.desc: Drivers get reminders and you get session alerts — seamlessly automated.

cta.title: Ready to Start Earning?
cta.sub: Join hundreds of parking space owners already making money on Space Park. Zero cost to apply.

contact.title: Have Questions?
contact.sub: Submit any questions you have and our team will get back to you.

footer.desc: The smart way to monetize your parking space. Connect with thousands of drivers and earn automatically.

howItWorks.title: How Space Park Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Space Park connects private parking space owners with drivers who need reliable parking. Here's exactly how the partner programme works from start to first payout.

1.title: Submit Your Application
1.desc: Fill out a quick form with your personal details and zone information — name, address, number of slots, and proposed hourly rate. Pin the exact location on the map. The whole process takes under 5 minutes.

2.title: Application Review
2.desc: Our verification team reviews your submission within 2–5 business days. We may contact you to confirm ownership details. You can check your status anytime using your Application ID.

3.title: Get Approved & Go Live
3.desc: Once approved, your zone is automatically created on the Space Park platform and immediately visible to drivers on the mobile app. You'll receive an email with your login credentials for the Partner Portal.

4.title: Set Up Your Payout Account
4.desc: On first login, enter your bank account details. This is where your earnings will be deposited automatically — no manual withdrawal needed.

5.title: Monitor Your Earnings
5.desc: Use your Partner Dashboard to see real-time occupancy, session history, daily and monthly earnings, and zone performance stats with beautiful charts.

6.title: Get Paid
6.desc: Earnings from every completed parking session are automatically calculated, our commission is deducted transparently, and the remainder is deposited to your bank account on a rolling basis.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How much does Space Park charge?
faq.a1: Space Park keeps a 10% commission on every parking session. You keep 90% of all earnings. The commission rate is clearly visible on your dashboard.
faq.a2: Earnings are deposited to your bank account on a rolling basis — typically within 3–5 business days of a session completing.
faq.q3: Can I set my own rates?
faq.a3: Yes! You propose your hourly rate during the application. Once approved, you can contact support to adjust your rate at any time.
faq.q4: What if a driver damages my space?
faq.a4: Every session is logged with the vehicle details and timestamp. Our support team assists with dispute resolution.
faq.q5: How does the mobile app work?
faq.a5: Drivers using the Space Park app can see your zone on a map, check real-time availability, and pay digitally — completely cashless.
faq.a6: Yes — contact our support team or email support@spacepark.com to temporarily deactivate your zone without losing your account.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.date: Effective Date: February 9, 2026  ·  Last Updated: February 9, 2026

s1.title: 1. Introduction
s1.content: We are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring the security of your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use the Space Park mobile application, partner portal, and related services.

s2.title: 2. Information We Collect
s2.item1: Phone Number – for account creation and authentication
s2.item3: Email Address – for account access and notifications
s2.item4: Zone & Location Data – address and coordinates of your parking space
s2.item5: Bank Account Details – for earnings deposits
s2.item6: Documents – proof of ownership uploaded during application
s2.item7: Usage Data – sessions, earnings, app activity

s3.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
s3.item1: Create and manage your partner account
s3.item2: Process parking sessions and calculate earnings
s3.item3: Deposit funds to your registered bank account
s3.item4: Send notifications about applications, sessions, and payouts
s3.item6: Improve our services and develop new features

s4.title: 4. Data Sharing
s4.content: We do NOT sell your data. We may share information with service providers (payment processors, cloud hosting), legal authorities when required by law, or business partners in case of merger or acquisition. All service providers are contractually obligated to protect your data.

s7.title: 7. Children's Privacy
s7.content: Our Service is not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect information from children under 13.

privacy.consent: By using Space Park, you consent to this Privacy Policy. This policy complies with GDPR, CCPA, Google Play Store, and Apple App Store requirements.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.date: Effective Date: February 9, 2026  ·  Last Updated: February 9, 2026

s1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
s1.content: By accessing or using Space Park, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. These terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you and Space Park Ltd. If you do not agree, you must immediately cease all use of the Service.

s2.title: 2. User Eligibility and Responsibilities
s2.item1: You must be at least 18 years of age and possess legal authority to form a binding contract.
s2.item2: You are responsible for ensuring all information provided (zone details, bank info, etc.) is accurate and up to date.
s2.item3: You agree to comply with all local property and parking laws.
s2.item4: You are solely responsible for any activity that occurs under your account.

s3.title: 3. Account Security
s3.item1: You must safeguard your login credentials and not share them with third parties.
s3.item2: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that show suspicious activity.
s3.item3: Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.

s4.title: 4. Partner Zone Services
s4.content: Space Park provides a digital platform for listing your parking space, receiving automated payments, monitoring earnings in real-time, and managing your zone remotely. Availability data is dynamic. Space Park is not responsible for modifications to parking zone accessibility by municipal authorities.

s5.title: 5. Financial Terms and Earnings
s5.item1: All rates are inclusive of applicable taxes unless stated otherwise.
s5.item2: Earnings are calculated after Space Park's commission is deducted (displayed on your dashboard).
s5.item3: Funds are deposited to your registered bank account on a rolling basis.
s5.item4: Earning disputes must be submitted within 7 days via support.

s6.title: 6. Data Privacy and Processing
s6.content: We collect and process your personal data, including location information and bank details, to provide the Services. Our use of your data is governed by our Privacy Policy, aligned with applicable data protection laws.

s7.title: 7. Violations and Enforcement
s7.content: Misuse of the platform, providing false information, or violating these terms may result in immediate suspension of your account and forfeiture of pending earnings.

s8.title: 8. Intellectual Property
s8.content: All content, including logos, UI designs, and underlying code, is the exclusive property of Space Park Ltd. Any unauthorized reproduction or reverse engineering is strictly prohibited.

s9.title: 9. Dispute Resolution
s9.content: Any disputes shall first be attempted to be resolved through good-faith mediation. If mediation fails, the dispute shall be settled by binding arbitration in accordance with applicable law.

s10.title: 10. Disclaimers
s10.content: SPACE PARK IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE". TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, SPACE PARK LTD DISCLAIMS ALL WARRANTIES. YOU AGREE TO INDEMNIFY AND HOLD HARMLESS SPACE PARK LTD FROM ANY CLAIMS ARISING FROM YOUR MISUSE OF THE SERVICE.

terms.agreement: BY USING SPACE PARK, YOU ACKNOWLEDGE THAT YOU HAVE READ, UNDERSTOOD, AND AGREE TO BE BOUND BY THESE TERMS OF SERVICE.
terms.compliance: Compliant with Google Play Store and Apple App Store requirements.
